message:
fix(test): prevent pipe buffer blocking in e2e test harness (bd-28w2)

Change spawn_process() from Stdio::piped() to Stdio::null() for
long-running daemon processes. The 64KB Linux pipe buffer was filling
when daemon output wasn't drained, blocking the daemon on write and
making it unresponsive to socket requests. This caused flaky failures
in test_load_balance_distribution and test_cached_project_locality.

Also includes beads sync with new issues filed for remaining TODOs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -70,6 +70,7 @@ whoami = "2"
 rch-common = { workspace = true, features = ["rich-ui"] }
 proptest = "1.7.0"
 ctor = { workspace = true }
+serial_test = "3.2"
 
 [lints.rust]
 unsafe_code = "forbid"
